name: chess-to-mp4
description: convert mp4 into chess-piece mosaic video using ffmpeg + sharp

scripts.build:linux: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node22.23.1-linux-x64 --output dist/chess-to-mp4-linux --fallback-to-source
scripts.build:win: npm run bundle && pkg . --targets node22.23.1-win-x64 --output dist/chess-to-mp4-win.exe --fallback-to-source
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:win
